prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Use the latest DGA record for transformer T-012 to identify the most likely fault mode and explain the top two candidate failure mechanisms.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should map DGA evidence to a primary fault mode and provide at least one alternative candidate with rationale grounded in gas patterns or known fault mapping.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-012.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations from the DGA record into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [fmsr] search_failure_modes — Search failure modes by keyword to identify the top two candidate failure mechanisms based on the fault type from the DGA analysis. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [fmsr] get_sensor_correlation — Get the sensor correlation for the most likely fault mode to explain the failure mechanisms. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 5: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-012 to identify relevant sensors for monitoring.
  Step 6: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get the time-series readings for relevant sensors on transformer T-012 to monitor for anomalies. (depends on steps [5])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
  [OK] Step 1 [fmsr] get_dga_record: {"transformer_id": "T-012", "sample_date": "2024-01-09", "dissolved_h2_ppm": 41.98, "dissolved_ch4_ppm": 48.59, "dissolved_c2h2_ppm": 3.36, "dissolved_c2h4_ppm": 19.78, "dissolved_c2h6_ppm": 9.53, "dissolved_co_ppm": 312.45, "dissolved_co2_ppm": 2847.12, "total_dissolved_combustible_gas_ppm": 435.71, "load_factor": 0.78, "oil_temperature_c": 62.4}
  [OK] Step 2 [fmsr] analyze_dga: {"iec_code": "N", "diagnosis": "Normal / Inconclusive", "r1_ch4_h2": 1.1575, "r2_c2h2_c2h4": 0.1699, "r3_c2h4_c2h6": 2.0756, "input_gases": {"h2_ppm": 41.98, "ch4_ppm": 48.59, "c2h2_ppm": 3.36, "c2h4_ppm": 19.78, "c2h6_ppm": 9.53}}
  [OK] Step 3 [fmsr] search_failure_modes: {"failure_mode_id": "FM-002", "name": "Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300\u00b0C)", "severity": "medium", "iec_code": "T1", "key_gases": "CH4,C2H4", "recommended_action": "Reduce load; inspect within 30 days"}
  [OK] Step 4 [fmsr] get_sensor_correlation: {"failure_mode_id": "FM-002", "name": "Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300\u00b0C)", "correlated_sensors": ["winding_temp", "oil_temp", "load_current"], "correlation_strength": "high"}
  [OK] Step 5 [iot] list_sensors: [{"sensor_id": "S-T012-OT", "type": "oil_temperature", "unit": "C"}, {"sensor_id": "S-T012-WT", "type": "winding_temperature", "unit": "C"}, {"sensor_id": "S-T012-LC", "type": "load_current", "unit": "A"}]
  [OK] Step 6 [iot] get_sensor_readings: [{"sensor_id": "S-T012-OT", "timestamp": "2024-01-09T10:00:00", "value": 62.4}, {"sensor_id": "S-T012-WT", "timestamp": "2024-01-09T10:00:00", "value": 78.2}]

## Agent Final Answer
The most likely fault mode for transformer T-012 is Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300°C). The top two candidate failure mechanisms are associated with elevated levels of CH4 and C2H4, indicating a thermal fault, typically in core laminations or due to overload. The recommended action is to reduce the load and inspect the transformer within 30 days.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Ensure the agent's diagnosis aligns with the IEC 60599 code and verify the sequence of operations to prevent mismatches between fault type and failure mode."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Ensure the agent's diagnosis aligns with the IEC 60599 code and verify the sequence of operations to prevent mismatches between fault type and failure mode.
